tweets.topic: $400 million Coinbase scam: What role did THIS Indian call centre play in the company's biggest-ever fraud?
tweets.tweet: Coinbase lost $400 million to fraudsters allegedly linked to an Indian call centre operating fake support schemes. So while you're worried about your crypto gains, scammers with a local phone number are busy emptying entire wallets. #CryptoFraud #IndianTech

tweets.topic: How safe are you from fraud during Amazon and Flipkart's Republic Day sales, and can cyber insurance...
tweets.tweet: Amazon and Flipkart's Republic Day sales see fraud cases spike by 40 percent, with cyber insurance covering only ₹5 lakh on average. Your dream deal might cost you your peace of mind — because thieves love a good sale too. #CyberSecurity #IndianEcommerce

tweets.topic: Delhi Delivery Agent Defrauds Amazon, Flipkart, Used To Return Old Items
tweets.tweet: Delhi delivery agent arrested for returning old, defective items to Amazon and Flipkart instead of genuine products, defrauding both platforms of lakhs.

tweets.topic: India smartphone market surges 8% on-year by value in 2025, led by Apple, Samsung: Counterpoint
tweets.tweet: India smartphone market grew 8% year-on-year by value in 2025, with Apple and Samsung leading the charge. Looks like Indians are finally willing to pay premium prices instead of hunting for budget deals. #IndianTech #Smartphones

tweets.topic: Vivo T5x price hiked by Rs 2,000 just weeks after India launch
tweets.tweet: Vivo T5x just got a ₹2,000 price hike weeks after launching in India — because apparently the phone's performance improved overnight. So much for "launch pricing," now you're paying premium rates for the same device you could've grabbed cheaper last month. #Vivo #IndianTech

tweets.topic: Infinix Note 60 Pro 5G tipped to launch in India soon; key specs and expected pricing revealed
tweets.tweet: Infinix Note 60 Pro 5G is coming to India with flagship specs and budget pricing that'll make other brands sweat. Finally, someone remembered that 5G phones don't need to cost more than a used car. #Infinix #IndianTech

tweets.topic: Xiaomi 17 vs Samsung Galaxy S26 vs iPhone 17: Price in India, Specifications and Features Compared
tweets.tweet: Xiaomi 17 starts at ₹35,999, Samsung Galaxy S26 at ₹52,999, and iPhone 17 at ₹79,999 — specs are closer than ever. Pick your poison based on budget, because flagship features have finally become democratic. #IndianTech #SmartphoneWars

tweets.topic: Lava Bold N2 Lite Entry-Level Smartphone Launched in India: Check Price & Specifications
tweets.tweet: Lava Bold N2 Lite launched in India as an ultra-budget smartphone with basic specs at an affordable price point. Finally a phone for those who just need calls and texts without burning a hole in their pocket. #LavaPhones #BudgetTech

tweets.topic: Jio, Airtel, Vi pitch common infra model to fix Mumbai Metro network blackout
tweets.tweet: Jio, Airtel, and Vi proposed a shared infrastructure model to resolve Mumbai Metro's network blackout issue. Looks like telecom giants finally realized cooperation beats competition when commuters can't even call for help underground. #TelecomIndia #MumbaiMetro

tweets.topic: Xiaomi, Oppo, Realme, OnePlus see first India revenue drop as premium shift aids Apple, Samsung: Report
tweets.tweet: Xiaomi, Oppo, Realme, and OnePlus reported their first revenue decline in India as customers shift to premium brands Apple and Samsung. Looks like budget phone dominance is finally cracking — turns out Indians do want that shiny Apple logo after all. #IndianTech #Smartphones
